testsuite.name: com.cscyxp.bookkeeping.TransactionListViewModelTest

testcase.name: uiState - should emit loading before content()
updateTransaction - should pass transaction to repository update correctly()
set filter - should update uiState filter correctly()
uiState - should pass filter to repository correctly()
category dialog filter - should emit categories by type()

testsuite.system-out: Expect: Loading | Actual: Loading Expect: 696905.12 | Actual: 696905.12 Expect: 739123.20 | Actual: 739123.20 Expect: -42218.08 | Actual: -42218.08 Expect: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=2026, category=null) | Actual: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=2026, category=null) Expect: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=1111, category=null) | Actual: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=1111, category=null) Expect: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=1111, category=Category(id=2, name=随机, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[])) | Actual: TransactionFilter(month=2, year=1111, category=Category(id=2, name=随机, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[])) Expect: TransactionFilter(month=1, year=1111, category=Category(id=1, name=随机, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[])) | Actual: TransactionFilter(month=1, year=1111, category=Category(id=1, name=随机, type=0, icon=, parentId=null, sonCategories=[])) Expect: 1 | Actual: 1
